revision.comment: Bot: mark 11 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24432061637|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天王祭]]
Gion Festivals (祇園祭) and '''Tenno Festivals (Tennōsai''' 天王祭) are festivals held at [[Gion shrines|Gion Shrines]] and {{ill|Tenno Shrine|ja|天王神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōsha|qq=}} shrines dedicated to [[Gozu Tennō]] (牛頭天王). Gozu Tennō has been syncretized with Japan's [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]], and related legends and customs are found throughout Japan. They are the festivals of the [[Gion Faith|Gion cult]]
The Gion Festival, especially its elements related to {{ill|Matsuri float|en|Matsuri float|qid=Q11470974|lt=yamahoko processions|1=Matsuri float}} and {{ill|Hayashi (music)|en|Hayashi (music)|qid=Q4171186|lt=Hayashi music|1=Hayashi (music)}}, represents the most glamorous festival conducted by the {{ill|machishū|ja|町衆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/machishū|qq=}} and {{ill|Chōnin|en|Chōnin|qid=Q115847|lt=chōnin|1=Chōnin}} classes in the {{ill|capital|ja|都|lt=capital|1=metropolitan prefecture|3=都|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/capital|13=User:Immanuelle/Metropolitan prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124313007}}. This strong influence has spread widely to local festivals across Japan, particularly those held in {{ill|Jōkamachi|en|Jōkamachi|qid=Q909458|lt=Jōkamachi|1=Jōkamachi}} and conducted by chōnin. Additionally, the name "Gion Festival" itself has been widely adopted as a name for festivals held at shrines and temples dedicated to deities such as {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} and {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, as well as summer festivals in general.
== [[:ja:祇園祭#日本全国の祇園祭|Major Gion Festivals Across Japan]] ==
Given the overwhelming number of festivals dedicated to the same deities or influenced by the Gion Festival, listing them comprehensively is not practical. This section highlights a selection of festivals bearing the Gion Festival name or strongly influenced by it. For festivals related to {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} or Susanoo, see {{ill|Tenno Festival|ja|天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno Festival|1=Gion and Tenno Festivals|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17221495}}. For specific influences of the Gion Festival, refer to articles about local festivals.
* [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] ** {{ill|Oshima Peninsula|en|Oshima Peninsula|qid=Q1370712|lt=Oshima Peninsula|1=Oshima Peninsula}} *** August 9–dd: {{ill|Ubagami Daijingu Togyo Festival|ja|姥神大神宮渡御祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubakami Shrine Togyo Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Esashi, Hokkaido (Hiyama)|en|Esashi, Hokkaido (Hiyama)|qid=Q1348738|lt=Esashi, Hokkaido|1=Esashi, Hokkaido (Hiyama)}}) – Designated Hokkaido Intangible Folk Cultural Property.
* [[:en:Tohoku Region|Tohoku Region]] ** July 22–24: {{ill|Aizu Tajima Gion Festival|ja|会津田島祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Tajima Gion Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Minamiaizu|en|Minamiaizu|qid=Q1205058|lt=Minamiaizu, Fukushima|1=Minamiaizu}}) – National Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property. Self-proclaimed one of the "Three Great Gion Festivals." ** August 15–17: {{ill|Wakinosawa Summer Festival|ja|脇野沢夏まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakinosawa Summer Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Mutsu, Aomori|en|Mutsu, Aomori|qid=Q641992|lt=Mutsu, Aomori|1=Mutsu, Aomori}}, {{ill|Wakinosawa|ja|脇野沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakinosawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Designated Aomori Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property. ** August 18–20: {{ill|Tanabu Festival|ja|田名部まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanabu Festival|qq=}} (Mutsu, {{ill|Tanabu|ja|田名部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanabu|1=Tanabu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q108779084}}) – Designated Aomori Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property; considered the oldest in the Mutsu-Shimokita region (dating back to the Genroku era). ** Mid-to-late August: {{ill|Noheji Gion Festival|ja|野辺地祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noheji Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504283}} ({{ill|Noheji|en|Noheji|qid=Q1362344|lt=Noheji, Aomori|1=Noheji}}) – Designated Noheji Intangible Folk Cultural Property. ** September 14–16: {{ill|Yanemori Hachimangu Shrine Festival|ja|箭根森八幡宮例大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanemori Hachimangu Shrine Festival|1=Yanonemori Hachimangu Shrine Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24874430}} ({{ill|Sai, Aomori|en|Sai, Aomori|qid=Q1362393|lt=Sai, Aomori|1=Sai, Aomori}}) – Designated Aomori Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property, dating to the Genroku era (1696). ** September 14–16: {{ill|Ohata Festival|ja|大畑祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ohata Festival|1=Ohata Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438026}} (Mutsu, {{ill|Ōhata, Aomori|en|Ōhata, Aomori|qid=Q8081493|lt=Ohata Town|1=Ōhata, Aomori}}) – Designated Aomori Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property. ** Mid-to-late September: {{ill|Kawauchi Hachimangu Shrine Festival|ja|川内八幡宮例大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawauchi Hachimangu Shrine Festival|qq=}} (Mutsu, {{ill|Kawauchi Town (Aomori)|ja|川内町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawauchi Town (Aomori)|1=川内町|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11477744}}) – Designated Aomori Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property; the largest in the prefecture.
* [[:en:Kanto Region|Kanto Region]] ** Early July: *** {{ill|Chochin Festival|ja|提灯まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chochin Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki, Saitama|1=Kuki, Saitama}}) *** {{ill|Narita Gion Festival|ja|成田祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narita Gion Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Narita, Chiba|en|Narita, Chiba|qid=Q273798|lt=Narita, Chiba|1=Narita, Chiba}}) ** July 14: {{ill|Ofuda Maki|ja|お札まき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ofuda Maki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Totsuka Ward, Yokohama|ja|横浜市戸塚区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuka Ward, Yokohama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Men participate in {{ill|cross-dressing|ja|女装|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cross-dressing|1=male-to-female crossdressing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7452156}}. ** July 14–21: {{ill|Suga Shrine Gion Festival|ja|須賀神社祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suga Shrine Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504287}} ({{ill|Oyama, Tochigi|en|Oyama, Tochigi|qid=Q374511|lt=Oyama, Tochigi|1=Oyama, Tochigi}}) ** Mid-July: *** {{ill|Kozuru Gion Festival|ja|小鶴祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozuru Gion Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Ibaraki, Ibaraki|ja|東茨城郡茨城町小鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki, Ibaraki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) *** {{ill|Enoshima Tenno Festival|ja|江ノ島天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enoshima Tenno Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504293}} ({{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa, Kanagawa|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}} and {{ill|Kamakura|en|Kamakura|qid=Q200267|lt=Kamakura, Kanagawa|1=Kamakura}}) *** {{ill|Tanbayama Gion Festival|ja|丹波山祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanbayama Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504297}} ({{ill|Tabayama, Yamanashi|ja|北都留郡丹波山村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tabayama, Yamanashi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) *** {{ill|Sawara Gion Festival|ja|佐原祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawara Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 佐原の大祭|1=Sawara Float Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11383026}} ({{ill|Katori, Chiba|en|Katori, Chiba|qid=Q858357|lt=Katori, Chiba|1=Katori, Chiba}}) *** {{ill|Yasaka Shrine Gion Festival (Ryugasaki)|ja|八坂神社祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka Shrine Gion Festival (Ryugasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504301}} ({{ill|Ryugasaki, Ibaraki|ja|龍ヶ崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryugasaki, Ibaraki|qq=}}) ** July 20–22: {{ill|Kumagaya Uchiwa Festival|en|Kumagaya Uchiwa Festival|qid=Q11568692|lt=Kumagaya Uchiwa Festival|1=Kumagaya Uchiwa Festival}} ({{ill|Kumagaya|en|Kumagaya|qid=Q41106|lt=Kumagaya, Saitama|1=Kumagaya}}) ** July 23–25: {{ill|Mashiko Gion Festival|ja|益子祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mashiko Gion Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Mashiko, Tochigi|en|Mashiko, Tochigi|qid=Q1346925|lt=Mashiko, Tochigi|1=Mashiko, Tochigi}}) ** Late July: *** {{ill|Fukaya Festival|ja|深谷まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukaya Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|qid=Q734532|lt=Fukaya, Saitama|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}) *** {{ill|Fujioka Festival|ja|藤岡まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujioka Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504303}} ({{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|en|Fujioka, Gunma|qid=Q596486|lt=Fujioka, Gunma|1=Fujioka, Gunma}}) – Held in late August during gubernatorial or parliamentary elections.
* [[Chubu Region]] ** Mid-June: {{ill|Yoshiwara Gion Festival|ja|吉原祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Gion Festival|1=Yoshiwara Gion festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11412729}} ({{ill|Fuji, Shizuoka|en|Fuji, Shizuoka|qid=Q328613|lt=Fuji, Shizuoka|1=Fuji, Shizuoka}}) ** Late June: {{ill|Horikome Naked Festival|ja|堀米の裸祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikome Naked Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504305}} ({{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|en|Matsumoto, Nagano|qid=Q213324|lt=Matsumoto, Nagano|1=Matsumoto, Nagano}}) ** July 7–13: {{ill|Nagano Gion Festival|ja|ながの祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弥栄神社 (長野市)|1=Yasaka Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43594829}} ({{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano, Nagano|1=Nagano (city)}}) ** Second Saturday of July: {{ill|Nanao Gion Festival|ja|七尾祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanao Gion Festival|1=Nanao Gion Matsuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11353501}} ({{ill|Nanao, Ishikawa|en|Nanao, Ishikawa|qid=Q695892|lt=Nanao, Ishikawa|1=Nanao, Ishikawa}}) ** Mid-July: *** {{ill|Abare Festival|en|Abare Festival|qid=Q4663470|lt=Abare Festival|1=Abare Festival}} ({{ill|Noto, Ishikawa|en|Noto, Ishikawa|qid=Q1349388|lt=Noto, Ishikawa|1=Noto, Ishikawa}}) *** {{ill|Yamanashi Gion Festival|ja|山梨祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504307}} ({{ill|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|en|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|qid=Q821337|lt=Fukuroi, Shizuoka|1=Fukuroi, Shizuoka}}) *** {{ill|Hosoe Shrine Gion Festival|ja|細江神社祇園祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoe Shrine Gion Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504309}} ({{ill|Hamamatsu|en|Hamamatsu|qid=Q185125|lt=Hamamatsu, Shizuoka|1=Hamamatsu}}) – The mikoshi is placed on boats for a lake procession.
== [[:ja:天王祭|Major Tennō Festivals Across Japan]] ==
* '''{{ill|Tenno Matsuri|en|Tenno Matsuri|qid=Q11465312|lt=Owari Tsushima Tennō Festival|1=Tenno Matsuri}}''' ({{ill|Tsushima Shrine|en|Tsushima Shrine|qid=Q705136|lt=Tsushima Shrine|1=Tsushima Shrine}}, Shinmei Town, {{ill|Tsushima, Aichi|en|Tsushima, Aichi|qid=Q816736|lt=Tsushima City, Aichi|1=Tsushima, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture): The main shrine of Tennōsha. * {{ill|Gion Matsuri|en|Gion Matsuri|qid=Q979873|lt=Gion Matsuri|1=Gion Matsuri}} ({{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}}, Gion Town, {{ill|Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|en|Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1203862|lt=Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|1=Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto}}, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture): One of Japan's three major festivals.
=== Tōhoku Region === * [http://www.city.sukagawa.fukushima.jp/kanko/event06.html Kyuuri Tennō Festival] ({{ill|Iwa-no-Nishi Shrine|ja|岩瀬神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwa-no-Nishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Sukagawa, Fukushima|en|Sukagawa, Fukushima|qid=Q819664|lt=Sukagawa City|1=Sukagawa, Fukushima}}, Fukushima Prefecture, held annually on July 14)
=== Kantō Region === * Tennō Festival ({{ill|Utsunomiya|en|Utsunomiya|qid=Q200589|lt=Utsunomiya|1=Utsunomiya}}, Tochigi Prefecture) - Annual festivals of the {{ill|Suga Shrine (Utsunomiya)|ja|須賀神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suga Shrine (Utsunomiya)|1=Suga Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11253400}} at the subordinate shrines of {{ill|Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|en|Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|qid=Q10946254|lt=Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|1=Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine}}, {{ill|Hanada Hachimangu|ja|塙田八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanada Hachimangu|1=Hanawada Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11428387}}, and {{ill|Imaizumi Yasaka Shrine|ja|今泉八坂神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imaizumi Yasaka Shrine|1=Imaizumi Yasaka Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11377238}}. * Yasaka Festival ({{ill|Mibu, Tochigi|en|Mibu, Tochigi|qid=Q1354910|lt=Mibu, Tochigi|1=Mibu, Tochigi}}, Shimotsuga District, Tochigi Prefecture) - Held at {{ill|Ogoto Shrine|ja|雄琴神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ogoto Shrine|1=Ogoto Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11659229}} from July 7 to 16 each year. * {{ill|Kiryu Yagibushi Festival|ja|桐生八木節まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiryu Yagibushi Festival|1=Kiryū Yagibushi festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11537271}} ({{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|qid=Q634022|lt=Kiryu|1=Kiryū, Gunma}}, Gunma Prefecture) * {{ill|Minami Tenma-chō Tennō Festival|ja|南伝馬町天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami Tenma-chō Tennō Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504311}} * {{ill|Ōtenma-chō Tennō Festival|ja|大伝馬町天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtenma-chō Tennō Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504314}} * {{ill|Kobune-chō Tennō Festival|ja|小舟町天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobune-chō Tennō Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本橋小舟町|1=Nihonbashi-Kobunachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11508334}} * Tennō Festival ({{ill|Minami Senju|ja|南千住|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami Senju|1=Minami-Senju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11407548}}, Arakawa City, Tokyo) - Annual grand festival of {{ill|Susanoo Shrine (Arakawa)|ja|素盞雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo Shrine (Arakawa)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 素盞嗚神社|1=Susanoo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605636}}. * Northern Tennō Festival (Kita-Shinagawa, Shinagawa City, Tokyo) - Annual grand festival of {{ill|Shinagawa Shrine|ja|品川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagawa Shrine|qq=}}. * Southern Tennō Festival (Kadda Festival, Kita-Shinagawa, Shinagawa City, Tokyo) - Annual grand festival of {{ill|Ebara Shrine|ja|荏原神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebara Shrine|1=Ebara Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11618312}}. * Gozu Tennō Festival (Kamitsuke, {{ill|Miyake-jima|en|Miyake-jima|qid=Q1075076|lt=Miyakejima|1=Miyake-jima}}) * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Tsurumi Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|鶴見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurumi Shrine (Yokohama)|1=Tsurumi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11676162}} (Tsurumi Ward, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama City|1=Yokohama}}, Kanagawa Prefecture) - Held annually on the fourth Friday, Saturday, and Sunday of July. * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Kodō Shrine|ja|小動神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodō Shrine|1=Koyurugi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459158}} and {{ill|Yasaka Shrine (Fujisawa)|ja|八坂神社 (藤沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka Shrine (Fujisawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504315|1=Yasaka Shrine (Fujisawa)}} ({{ill|Kamakura|en|Kamakura|qid=Q200267|lt=Kamakura|1=Kamakura}} and {{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture) - Held annually on the first Sunday, second Saturday, and Sunday of July. * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Suwa Shrine (Hakone)|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine (Hakone)|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2370082}} (Sengokuhara, Hakone, Kanagawa Prefecture) - Held annually on the third Sunday of July.
=== Chūbu Region === ;Niigata Prefecture * Tennō Festivals are held in {{ill|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|en|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|qid=Q633983|lt=Kashiwazaki|1=Kashiwazaki, Niigata}}, {{ill|Niigata (city)|en|Niigata (city)|qid=Q179691|lt=Niigata City|1=Niigata (city)}}, {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|qid=Q499047|lt=Sado City|1=Sado, Niigata}}, and other locations. ;Shizuoka Prefecture * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Yamana Shrine|ja|山名神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Shrine|1=Yamana Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11467612}} (Iida, {{ill|Mori, Shizuoka|en|Mori, Shizuoka|qid=Q1345571|lt=Mori Town, Shizuoka|1=Mori, Shizuoka}}, Shizuoka Prefecture) ;Aichi Prefecture * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Susaki Shrine|en|Susaki Shrine|qid=Q11556513|lt=Suzaki Shrine (Nagoya)|1=Susaki Shrine}} (Sakae, Naka Ward, {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|qid=Q11751|lt=Nagoya|1=Nagoya}}) * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Harina Shrine|ja|針名神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harina Shrine|1=Harina Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11648156}} (Tenpaku Ward, Nagoya) - Held annually on Marine Day. * {{ill|Tsutsui-chō Dekimachi Tennō Festival|ja|筒井町出来町天王祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsutsui-chō Dekimachi Tennō Festival|1=Tsutsui-chō Deki-machi Tennō-sai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603039}} (Higashi Ward, Nagoya) - Held annually on the first Saturday and Sunday of June. * Segi Tennō Festival (Segi Ward, {{ill|Tokoname|en|Tokoname|qid=Q209683|lt=Tokoname|1=Tokoname}}, Aichi Prefecture) - Held annually on the second Sunday of July. * Nakanomiya Tennō Festival (Okujo Ward, Tokoname) - Held annually on the third Sunday of July. * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Nuribe Shrine|ja|塗部神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuribe Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504317|1=Nuribe Shrine}} (Jinmeji, Ama City, Aichi Prefecture) - Held annually on the fourth Saturday of July.
=== Kansai Region === * Kawazaki Tennō Festival ({{ill|Kawasaki (Ise)|ja|河崎 (伊勢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawasaki (Ise)|1=Kawasaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11553824}}, Ise City, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}) - Held at {{ill|Kawabe Nanagusa Shrine|ja|河邊七種神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawabe Nanagusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504319|1=Kawabe Nanagusa Shrine}}. * Kujira Matsuri (Ōsatsu Town, {{ill|Toba, Mie|en|Toba, Mie|qid=Q819629|lt=Toba City, Mie|1=Toba, Mie}}) * Tennō Festival of {{ill|Funakoshi Shrine (Shima)|ja|船越神社 (志摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funakoshi Shrine (Shima)|qq=}} (Funakoshi, {{ill|Daiō, Mie|en|Daiō, Mie|qid=Q5209858|lt=Daio Town|1=Daiō, Mie}}, {{ill|Shima, Mie|en|Shima, Mie|qid=Q338009|lt=Shima City, Mie|1=Shima, Mie}}) * Watakano Tennō Festival (Watakano Island, {{ill|Isobe Town|ja|磯部町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isobe Town|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 磯部町 (曖昧さ回避)|1=Isobecho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588091}}, Shima City) - Held at {{ill|Yaegaki Shrine|en|Yaegaki Shrine|qid=Q3571285|lt=Yaegaki Shrine|1=Yaegaki Shrine}}. {{Event-stub}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Gion cult|en|Gion cult|qid=Q11588425|lt=Gion Faith|1=Gion Faith}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} * {{ill|Jōkamachi Festivals|ja|城下町の祭礼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōkamachi Festivals|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{Gion cult}}{{Japan-culture-stub}}
}}
